About Organization

Board of Secondary Education, BSEH Haryana is the organization responsible for conducting the Haryana Teacher Eligibility Test HTET 2025.

For more information, visit the official website of BSEH Haryana.


About the Programme

The Haryana Teacher Eligibility Test HTET 2025 is a government job opportunity for candidates who want to become teachers in government schools.

The programme aims to select eligible candidates for the post of teachers in government schools.
